behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names rustls version 0.23.37, aws-lc-rs feature, workspace Cargo.toml, chroma-tracing Cargo.toml, and the exact API call rustls::crypto::aws_lc_rs::default_provider().install_default().

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes requirements (API call, comment content, where to install) but doesn't specify exact file paths like init_tracer.rs or function names like install_rustls_crypto_provider.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests only check cargo build/fmt/clippy/doc, workspace Cargo.toml rustls version+feature, and chroma-tracing Cargo.toml workspace dep — no assertion on function names or exact source file contents.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute cargo subprocesses (check, fmt, clippy, doc) and parse TOML structurally.

test_not_tautological.reason: f2p tests require actual rustls dep addition with version 0.23.37 and aws-lc-rs feature; cargo check/clippy must succeed with real code changes.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Instruction requires the source file to contain the API call `rustls::crypto::aws_lc_rs::default_provider().install_default()` and a specific comment, but no test inspects source code for these — agent could satisfy tests without installing the provider at runtime.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have clear names and docstrings indicating purpose (pass-to-pass vs fail-to-pass).

structured_data_schema.reason: Task does not produce structured data output.

no_typos.reason: Paths, commands, and crate names are consistent and correct.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction refers to 'the source file that initializes OTLP tracing' without naming init_tracer.rs or specific lines.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: Gold patch is localized additions to Cargo.toml files and one source file.
